hero.description: Real-time monitoring, DA/DR analysis, link profile health score and personalized recommendations to boost your SEO.

features.title: Your link profile, under total control
features.subtitle: Monitoring, analysis, recommendations: everything you need for a healthy and high-performing backlink profile.

items.title: Real-time monitoring
items.desc: Monitor every backlink 24/7. Instantly detect lost links, status changes (nofollow, redirect, 404) and anchor modifications.

items.title: DA / DR analysis
items.desc: Get the key metrics of each domain: Domain Authority, Domain Rating, Trust Flow, Citation Flow, spam score and authority history.

items.title: Profile health score
items.desc: A global score evaluates the quality of your link profile: dofollow/nofollow ratio, anchor diversity, TLD distribution and acquisition velocity.

items.title: Smart recommendations
items.desc: Our engine analyzes your profile and your competitors' to recommend which types of backlinks to prioritize: guest posts, directories, broken links, PBN.

items.title: Advanced analytics
items.desc: Visualize the evolution of your backlinks, anchor distribution, referring domains, C-class IPs and the impact on your rankings.

items.title: Alerts & reports
items.desc: Receive email notifications when a link drops or a new backlink is detected. Export PDF reports for your clients.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in 3 minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Add your domain. Snapeous analyzes, monitors and guides you.

steps.title: Add your domain
steps.desc: Enter your site's URL. Snapeous automatically launches a full crawl and retrieves all your existing backlinks.

steps.title: Automatic analysis
steps.desc: Our engine evaluates each link: HTTP status, rel attribute, anchor, source domain DA/DR, topical relevance and SEO potential.

steps.title: Track & optimize
steps.desc: Check your dashboard, receive real-time alerts and follow recommendations to strengthen your link profile.

items.name: Marie Laurent
items.text: Thanks to real-time monitoring, we detected and recovered 12 lost backlinks in one month. The ROI is immediate.

items.name: Thomas Durand
items.text: The integrated DA/DR analysis saves us from juggling between 3 tools. We see the quality of each incoming link at a glance.

items.name: Sophie Chen
items.text: The smart recommendations changed our strategy. We know exactly which type of backlinks to acquire first.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Try 7 days free on paid plans. No commitment.

items.a: Snapeous regularly crawls pages pointing to your site to check each link's status (200, 301, 404, etc.), rel attribute (dofollow/nofollow), anchor and effective link presence. Any change triggers an alert.
Snapeous displays Domain Authority (DA), Domain Rating (DR), Trust Flow, Citation Flow, Spam Score, IP address, backlink count, referring domains and indexation status for each analyzed domain.

Our algorithm analyzes the composition of your profile (link types, anchors, TLDs, topics) and compares it to the profiles of top-ranking sites in your niche. It identifies gaps and recommends actions to prioritize.

items.q: What's the difference with Ahrefs or Moz?
items.a: Snapeous focuses on active monitoring and actionable recommendations. Rather than a passive analysis tool, it's a copilot that alerts you in real-time and guides you to improve your link profile.
Yes, all plans allow CSV export of backlinks and metrics. Pro and Agency plans also offer customized PDF reports with your branding, perfect for client presentations.
No, all plans are commitment-free. You can cancel at any time. The Starter plan is free forever and paid plans include a 14-day trial.

cta.title: Take back control of your backlinks
cta.description: Real-time monitoring, DA/DR analysis, personalized recommendations. Everything you need for a high-performing link profile.
cta.note: Free forever. No credit card required.

footer.description: The smart platform to track, analyze and optimize your backlink profile.
